description: Moves the persistence monolith and the graph persister into src/core/database/. Keeps persistence.js whole (not split into per-table query modules yet) so each step is independently revertible. After this batch lands, a follow-up will carve the class into a connection module + per-table query modules.
notes: persistence.js contains a dynamic lib-loader (path.join(__dirname, '..', 'lib') ...) that the AST rewriter cannot see — that path will be hand-patched after the move to keep the loader pointing at the right place.
